Title: User Login Valid Scenario
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the valid username.
3. Enter the valid password.
4. Click the login button.

Title: User Login Invalid Scenario
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the invalid username.
3. Enter the valid password.
4. Click the login button.
Expected Result: Login fails, and an error message is displayed.

Title: User Logout Scenario
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile page.
2. Click the logout button.

Title: Admin Login Valid Scenario
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the admin login page.
2. Enter the valid username.
3. Enter the valid password.
4. Click the login button.

Title: Admin Login Invalid Scenario
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the admin login page.
2. Enter the invalid username.
3. Enter the valid password.
4. Click the login button.
Expected Result: Login fails, and an error message is displayed.

Title: Admin Logout Scenario
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the admin profile page.
2. Click the logout button.

Title: View Product Scenario
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page.
2. Select a product to view.
Expected Result: The selected product's details are displayed.

Title: Update Product Scenario
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and product exists in the system.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the admin product management page.
2. Select a product to update.
3. Update the product's details.
4. Click the update button.
Expected Result: The product's details are successfully updated.

Title: Add Product to Cart Scenario
Preconditions: User is logged in and product exists in the system.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page.
2. Select a product to add to the cart.
3. Click the add to cart button.
Expected Result: The selected product is added to the user's cart.

Title: Remove Product from Cart Scenario
Preconditions: User is logged in and product exists in the cart.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page.
2. Select a product to remove from the cart.
3. Click the remove from cart button.
Expected Result: The selected product is successfully removed from the cart.

Title: Checkout Scenario
Preconditions: User is logged in, has products in the cart, and shipping information is provided.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page.
2. Click the checkout button.
3. Enter the shipping information.
4. Confirm the order.
Expected Result: The order is successfully placed, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Checkout with Empty Cart Scenario
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page.
2. Click the checkout button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, as the cart is empty.
